name: @samfp/pi-essentials
description: Essential extensions for pi — auto session naming, compact header, clipboard images, image pruning, markdown viewer, screenshots, and subagents.

scripts.build: esbuild src/auto-session-name.ts src/auto-title.ts src/compact-header.ts src/clipboard-image.ts src/image-context-pruner.ts src/markdown-viewer.ts src/screenshot.ts src/subagent.ts src/context-pruner.ts src/daily-log.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=dist --sourcemap --packages=external --external:@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external:@earendil-works/pi-tui --external:@earendil-works/pi-ai --external:@sinclair/typebox
scripts.dev: esbuild src/auto-session-name.ts src/auto-title.ts src/compact-header.ts src/clipboard-image.ts src/image-context-pruner.ts src/markdown-viewer.ts src/screenshot.ts src/subagent.ts src/context-pruner.ts src/daily-log.ts --bundle --platform=node --format=esm --outdir=dist --sourcemap --watch --packages=external --external:@earendil-works/pi-coding-agent --external:@earendil-works/pi-tui --external:@earendil-works/pi-ai --external:@sinclair/typebox
